# OpenThorn

> OpenThorn is a free BYOK (bring-your-own-key) AI website builder. You describe the website you want in plain language; OpenThorn's AI agent generates complete, deployable code, previews it in the browser, and deploys it. You connect your own API key from an AI provider and pay that provider directly — OpenThorn charges no subscription and adds no markup.

Key facts:

- The OpenThorn platform is free; AI usage is billed by your own provider at their published rates.
- Supports 17 AI providers: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, DeepSeek, Mistral AI, Groq, Together AI, xAI, Cohere, Perplexity, OpenRouter, Ollama (local models), Fireworks AI, Cerebras, Azure OpenAI, Amazon Bedrock, and NVIDIA NIM.
- Generated code belongs to the user: it can be exported, pushed to GitHub, and deployed anywhere. No proprietary format, no export paywall.
- API keys are encrypted server-side and never exposed raw; users keep control via provider-side spend limits and key rotation.
- Built by BTA (Building Tech Alternatives). Source on GitHub: https://github.com/BuildingTechAlternatives/OpenThorn

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.openthorn.app/): What OpenThorn is and how it works
- [Model Pricing](https://www.openthorn.app/pricing): Live per-token cost and quality comparison across supported AI models
- [FAQ](https://www.openthorn.app/faq): Common questions about BYOK, providers, costs, security, and data
- [Blog](https://www.openthorn.app/blog): Product updates and guides
- [Changelog](https://www.openthorn.app/changelog): Every update, generated automatically from the GitHub commit history
- [What is a BYOK AI website builder?](https://www.openthorn.app/blog/what-is-a-byok-ai-website-builder): Definition and explanation of the BYOK model
